name: Verifica_Menu_Nomina
wl_code:
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, 186, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=-1 THEN
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
IF TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0 THEN
FOR i=187 TO 215
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, i, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
FOR i=303 TO 306
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, i, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=0
END
ELSE
FOR i=187 TO 215
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, i, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
FOR i=303 TO 306
gsResPath=TreeFind(TREE_Example, i, Null, tvLeaf + tvNode)
TREE_Example[gsResPath]..Checked=1
END
END
Local procedure Verifica_Menu_Obra
